summary: Marcus had a great start to the term — active participation in the math warm-up.
Completed the reading journal entry independently with good detail.
Struggled with long division concept; needed several prompts.
Excellent science lab partner — took careful notes and asked smart questions.
Was distracted during group work; reminded twice to stay on task.
Made a real breakthrough with long division — completed all 10 problems correctly.
Writing sample showed clear improvement in paragraph organisation.
Presented his science project confidently to the class.
Helped a struggling classmate with fractions without being asked — great peer leadership.
End-of-term assessment: above grade level in math, meeting expectations in literacy.
Started the new term strong — volunteered for every reading slot.
Needed reminders to complete homework three times this week.
Delivered an outstanding oral report on ecosystems.
Math skills continue to grow — tackled multiplication of fractions correctly.
Final assessment: consistently above expectations in math; making steady progress in writing.
